title: Lifecycle Agent
objective: Create lifecycle_agent.py that polls task queue every 5 minutes and automatically advances tasks through the pre-build lifecycle

deliverables.description: Main lifecycle orchestrator with tick and status commands

implementation_notes: Integrated with existing queue_manager.py, interview_manager.py, seeded_judge.py, plan_generator.py, availability_checker.py, and review_manager.py
Handles all required status transitions: queued → interviewing → seeded → planning → plan_review → approved → building
Uses actual API calls from context files, not placeholder logic
Includes dry-run mode for safe testing
JSON output format for all commands
Respects availability checking before HITL initiation
Uses correct threshold from config (0.8 confidence)
Properly handles fragment count checking before seeding judgment

api_integrations.pulse.py: start command delegation for approved builds

next_steps: Ready for integration with scheduled agent system and D1.3 pulse.py lifecycle command
